name: Central Library
description: The digital library houses over 100,000 volumes, academic journals, and a spacious quiet reading zone. It features electronic search database terminals and serves as the primary study space for students and researchers.
location: Located adjacent to the Main Administrative Building, opposite the Lecture Hall Complex.
Name: Central Library
Description: The digital library houses over 100,000 volumes, academic journals, and a spacious quiet reading zone. It features electronic search database terminals and serves as the primary study space for students and researchers.

name: Main Administrative Building
description: This iconic building hosts executive offices including the Vice Chancellor's office, the Registrar's office, and academic finance branches. All administrative affairs, ERP management, and registration validations are conducted here.
location: Situated at the central core of the campus, directly facing the main entrance boulevard.
Name: Main Administrative Building
Description: This iconic building hosts executive offices including the Vice Chancellor's office, the Registrar's office, and academic finance branches. All administrative affairs, ERP management, and registration validations are conducted here.

name: University Auditorium
description: A state-of-the-art facility with a seating capacity of 2,500 people, equipped with modern acoustic and lighting systems. It hosts major cultural festivals, convocation ceremonies, national conferences, and guest lectures.
location: Located near the Student Activity Center, accessible from the main ring road.
Name: University Auditorium
Description: A state-of-the-art facility with a seating capacity of 2,500 people, equipped with modern acoustic and lighting systems. It hosts major cultural festivals, convocation ceremonies, national conferences, and guest lectures.

name: Lecture Hall Complex
description: A multi-storey complex consisting of smart classrooms, halls (LH-1 to LH-4), and modern audio-visual learning aids. It serves as the primary venue for first and second-year undergraduate common courses and exams.
location: Situated opposite the Central Library, near the CSE Department.
Name: Lecture Hall Complex
Description: A multi-storey complex consisting of smart classrooms, halls (LH-1 to LH-4), and modern audio-visual learning aids. It serves as the primary venue for first and second-year undergraduate common courses and exams.

name: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
description: Hosts computer programming labs, AI laboratories, academic faculty chambers, and high-performance computing centers. It conducts cutting-edge research in networks, algorithms, and cybersecurity.
location: Located adjacent to the Lecture Hall Complex and near the central courtyard.
Name: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
Description: Hosts computer programming labs, AI laboratories, academic faculty chambers, and high-performance computing centers. It conducts cutting-edge research in networks, algorithms, and cybersecurity.
Aliases: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
aliases: Department of Computer Science and Engineering

name: Department of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
description: A newly established academic department with specialized labs for deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision. It is equipped with dedicated GPU-accelerated computing nodes.
location: Housed on the second floor of the Research and Innovation Center wing.
Name: Department of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
Description: A newly established academic department with specialized labs for deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision. It is equipped with dedicated GPU-accelerated computing nodes.
Aliases: Department of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
aliases: Department of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

name: Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
description: Features labs dedicated to VLSI design, digital signal processing, microwave engineering, and communication systems. It is one of the oldest departments with extensive research funding.
location: Situated in the Eastern Wing of the main academic block.
Name: Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
Description: Features labs dedicated to VLSI design, digital signal processing, microwave engineering, and communication systems. It is one of the oldest departments with extensive research funding.
Aliases: Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
aliases: Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering

name: Department of Mechanical Engineering
description: Contains heavy machineries, fluid mechanics labs, thermal engineering centers, and workshop facilities for manufacturing practices. It is active in automobile modeling and material science studies.
location: Located in the workshop area near the back gate of the academic campus.
Name: Department of Mechanical Engineering
Description: Contains heavy machineries, fluid mechanics labs, thermal engineering centers, and workshop facilities for manufacturing practices. It is active in automobile modeling and material science studies.

name: Department of Electrical Engineering
description: Equipped with power systems laboratories, electrical machine simulation setups, control system desks, and renewable energy research modules. It focuses on grid integration and electric vehicle charging research.
location: Situated in the Western Wing of the main academic block, adjacent to the ECE Department.
Name: Department of Electrical Engineering
Description: Equipped with power systems laboratories, electrical machine simulation setups, control system desks, and renewable energy research modules. It focuses on grid integration and electric vehicle charging research.

name: Department of Civil Engineering
description: Houses structural testing facilities, concrete design labs, surveying equipment, and environmental engineering testing kits. The department does consultation work for regional infrastructure projects.
location: Located near the Mechanical workshop area in the southern block.
Name: Department of Civil Engineering
Description: Houses structural testing facilities, concrete design labs, surveying equipment, and environmental engineering testing kits. The department does consultation work for regional infrastructure projects.

name: Department of Biotechnology
description: Equipped with advanced tissue culture, microbiology, molecular biology, and genomic sequencing apparatus. It provides hands-on training and works on biomedical research and bioremediation projects.
location: Located near the Research and Innovation Center, towards the campus nursery.
Name: Department of Biotechnology
Description: Equipped with advanced tissue culture, microbiology, molecular biology, and genomic sequencing apparatus. It provides hands-on training and works on biomedical research and bioremediation projects.

name: Research and Innovation Center
description: A premium research hub built to foster industry collaboration, startups, and intellectual property development. It features advanced analytical instruments and collaborative workspaces.
location: Positioned between the Biotechnology Department and the Main Administrative Building.
Name: Research and Innovation Center
Description: A premium research hub built to foster industry collaboration, startups, and intellectual property development. It features advanced analytical instruments and collaborative workspaces.

name: Student Activity Center
description: The nerve center of student life, hosting office chambers for student clubs, a common lounge, creative studios, and cafeteria corners. It is where club orientations, meetings, and jam sessions take place.
location: Located near the sports ground, behind the University Auditorium.
Name: Student Activity Center
Description: The nerve center of student life, hosting office chambers for student clubs, a common lounge, creative studios, and cafeteria corners. It is where club orientations, meetings, and jam sessions take place.

name: Sports Complex
description: Comprises a cricket stadium, athletic track, football ground, basketball court, and tennis setups. It is the primary venue for the annual sports meet, inter-college events, and daily fitness routines.
location: Located at the far northern edge of the campus, close to the hostel zone.
Name: Sports Complex
Description: Comprises a cricket stadium, athletic track, football ground, basketball court, and tennis setups. It is the primary venue for the annual sports meet, inter-college events, and daily fitness routines.

name: Guest House
description: Features premium suites, meeting halls, and dining facilities for visiting dignitaries, alumni, recruiters, and parents. It offers accommodation in a green, peaceful setting with room service.
location: Situated near the Main Gate entry, nestled in a quiet green zone.
Name: Guest House
Description: Features premium suites, meeting halls, and dining facilities for visiting dignitaries, alumni, recruiters, and parents. It offers accommodation in a green, peaceful setting with room service.
